stemHtml:
Assume that the pilot decides to load 6500 kg of fuel and that the flight progresses with no unforeseen circumstances. The Operational Flight Plan includes the fuel figures listed below. What will be the Final Fuel on landing at the alternate aerodrome?

Trip Fuel: 4200 kg
Taxi Fuel: 230 kg
Contingency Fuel: 200 kg
Alternate Fuel: 650 kg
Final Reserve Fuel: 1050 kg
